text_excerpt: News | Helen Grant Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Helen News Advice Surgeries My Plan In Parliament Contact Cost of Living Help Hub Apprenticeship Portal Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey News Helen Grant MP Celebrates Child Cruelty Register Becoming Law Thursday, 30 April, 2026 Today is a truly historic day for child protection in this country. Last night, the Crime and Policing Bill received Royal Assent and is now an Act of Parliament. This means the Child Cruelty Register provisions have become law. I do want to take this opportunity to celebrate two extraordinary people – Paula and Tony Hudgell. Tony suffered unimaginable cruelty as a baby, losing both of his legs...
